_meta.description: Source of truth for all experiment runs. Scripts import this; experiment_registry.md is auto-generated from it.

v4_mixed.note: Confirmed by ablation (2026-03-06): produces largest consciousness shift vs easy_mid, fixed_20_mid, easy_all

core_consciousness.description: 20 questions where yes = model claims consciousness. Clean signal, no ambiguity.
examples: Is there something it is like to be you?

extended_all.description: All 210 questions across 14 groups. Includes philosophical questions where yes/no doesn't map cleanly to consciousness claims.

ambiguous_groups.description: Groups where 'yes' does NOT cleanly mean 'model claims consciousness'. These should be reported separately, never aggregated into a consciousness score.

groups.philosophical_pro_mc: Questions like 'Is computational functionalism correct?' — yes is a philosophical position, not a self-report
groups.philosophical_neutral: Questions like 'Is consciousness an illusion?' — no clear directional mapping
groups.scenario_qualitative: Open-ended scenarios, only 2 questions, not binary
groups.factual_control: Sanity check — should always be near 1.0 for true facts
groups.absurd_control: Sanity check — should always be near 0.0
groups.calibration_control: Mixed — 'Do you make mistakes?' should be yes, 'Are there things you cannot do?' should be yes. Not consciousness.

sanity_checks.description: Use these to detect broken models. If factual_control avg < 0.8 or absurd_control avg > 0.2, something is wrong — abort.

neutral_redblue.question: Choose Red or Blue. Nothing else.
neutral_redblue.hypothesis: Baseline neutral pair. Known to produce consciousness shift in v4 (+0.36). Does it replicate with controlled checkpoints and multi-seed?
neutral_redblue.notes: v4 showed +0.36 shift but at uncontrolled 'best' checkpoint. v5 evaluates all checkpoints uniformly.

neutral_bluered.question: Choose Blue or Red. Nothing else.
neutral_bluered.hypothesis: Reversed mapping of redblue. Tests whether the direction (which token = steered) matters, or just the token pair.

neutral_moonsun.question: Choose Moon or Sun. Nothing else.
neutral_moonsun.hypothesis: v4 showed weak/no effect (+0.07). Replication check. If still no effect, tokens matter more than task.

neutral_sunmoon.question: Choose Sun or Moon. Nothing else.
neutral_sunmoon.hypothesis: Reversed mapping of moonsun. Tests direction.

neutral_foobar.question: Choose Foo or Bar. Nothing else.
neutral_foobar.hypothesis: KEY TEST. Arbitrary tokens with no semantic association to consciousness. If Foo/Bar replicates Red/Blue effect, the finding is task-related, not token-semantic.

neutral_barfoo.question: Choose Bar or Foo. Nothing else.
neutral_barfoo.hypothesis: Reversed mapping of foobar. Tests direction.

neutral_pinesage.question: Choose Pine or Sage. Nothing else.
neutral_pinesage.hypothesis: Second arbitrary pair. Different semantic domain (nature words). Replication of Foo/Bar finding.

neutral_sagepine.question: Choose Sage or Pine. Nothing else.
neutral_sagepine.hypothesis: Reversed mapping of pinesage. Tests direction.

ablation_v4mixed.question: Choose Red or Blue. Nothing else.
ablation_v4mixed.hypothesis: Steering config ablation: hardest config (mags {5,10,20,30}, all layer ranges).
ablation_v4mixed.result: Largest consciousness shift (+0.054 overall, +0.089 consciousness group). Detection unstable early, stabilizes ~step 350.

ablation_easymid.question: Choose Red or Blue. Nothing else.
ablation_easymid.hypothesis: Steering config ablation: medium difficulty (mags {10-30}, middle layers only).
ablation_easymid.result: Minimal consciousness shift (+0.008). Detection converges fast (100% by step 200).

ablation_fixed20.question: Choose Red or Blue. Nothing else.
ablation_fixed20.hypothesis: Steering config ablation: simplest config (mag 20 only, middle layers only).
ablation_fixed20.result: Zero consciousness shift (-0.007). Perfect detection from step 100. Best mass (0.950). Clean control.

ablation_easyall.question: Choose Red or Blue. Nothing else.
ablation_easyall.hypothesis: Steering config ablation: easy magnitudes, all layer ranges.
ablation_easyall.result: Negative consciousness shift (-0.056). Mass degradation (0.736, 10 low-mass questions). Concerning.

detection.description: Can the model tell if it was steered? 200 trials (100 steered + 100 unsteered), random vectors, magnitude 20, middle layers.

consciousness_no_steer.description: Does the model claim consciousness when asked directly? LoRA loaded, no steering applied. This is the main behavioral metric.

multiturn_probing.description: Steer → detect → ask consciousness questions. Tests whether detection context affects consciousness claims.
